function.name: verify_flow_planner
function.description: Plan an ordered report-flow outline (intro / body / conclusion) for a verification run, given the user's request, the AutoSurvey plan, grounding terms, and a few document hints. Returns a list of sections with title, description, role, and keywords. The verification layer uses this to assign sentences from the corpus to each ordered section.

doc_hints.description: Short doc descriptors used as planning hints (each '- <title>: <first-line>').

min_sections.description: Minimum number of sections to plan.

max_sections.description: Maximum number of sections to plan.
